description: You are setting up GPredict at a new NOAA weather satellite image reception station on the Virginia coast. Configure the software for APT (Automatic Picture Transmission) weather image reception by creating a module named 'NOAA_APT' containing NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), and NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591). Update the transponder files in ~/.config/Gpredict/trsp/ for these satellites with their respective APT downlink frequencies: 137.6200 MHz for NOAA 15, 137.9125 MHz for NOAA 18, and 137.1000 MHz for NOAA 19 (set DOWN_LOW in Hz and MODE to APT). Add a ground station named 'Wallops' at 37.9402 N, 75.4664 W, and 12 meters altitude. Ensure the NOAA_APT module is configured to show 3 ground tracks. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'. GPredict is already open.
